languages.text: Standing inside will apply Conductivity. Victicms with Conductivity recieve 100% Shock damage. Deals major Shock damage with generator active. Grants additional charges of Potential Energy

traits.locale_text: A creature standing in this area suffers the {g|f:15f32ade9f3e4b9f8e47a2840f514b70}conductivity{/g} effect. Creatures affected by {g|f:15f32ade9f3e4b9f8e47a2840f514b70}conductivity{/g} suffer +100% more shock damage. While the generator is overloaded, creatures in this area suffer heavy shock damage, but can accumulate additional {g|f:eb08585fc2cb4ae28ef4637c72f8ca47}potential energy{/g}.
A creature standing in this area suffers the {g|f:15f32ade9f3e4b9f8e47a2840f514b70}conductivity{/g} effect.

A creature standing in this area suffers the {g|f:15f32ade9f3e4b9f8e47a2840f514b70}conductivity{/g} effect. Creatures affected by {g|f:15f32ade9f3e4b9f8e47a2840f514b70}conductivity{/g} suffer +100% more {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g}. While the generator is overloaded, creatures in this area suffer heavy shock damage, but can gain additional {g|f:eb08585fc2cb4ae28ef4637c72f8ca47}potential energy{/g}.

languages.text: Существо, стоящее в этой области, получает эффект {g|f:15f32ade9f3e4b9f8e47a2840f514b70}проводимость{/g}.
languages.original_text: A creature standing in this area suffers the {g|f:15f32ade9f3e4b9f8e47a2840f514b70}conductivity{/g} effect.

traits.locale_text: Существо, стоящее в этой области, получает эффект {g|f:15f32ade9f3e4b9f8e47a2840f514b70}проводимость{/g}.
Существо, стоящее в этой области, получает эффект {g|f:15f32ade9f3e4b9f8e47a2840f514b70}проводимость{/g}.

languages.text: Toute créature qui se trouve dans cette zone subit l'effet {g|f:15f32ade9f3e4b9f8e47a2840f514b70}Conductivité{/g}.
languages.original_text: A creature standing in this area suffers the {g|f:15f32ade9f3e4b9f8e47a2840f514b70}conductivity{/g} effect.

traits.locale_text: Toute créature qui se trouve dans cette zone subit l'effet {g|f:15f32ade9f3e4b9f8e47a2840f514b70}Conductivité{/g}, qui augmente de +100 % les {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}dégâts d'électrocution{/g} subis. Tant que le générateur est surchargé, les créatures situées dans cette zone subissent d'importants dégâts d'électrocution, mais peuvent gagner de l'{g|f:eb08585fc2cb4ae28ef4637c72f8ca47}Énergie potentielle{/g} supplémentaire.

languages.text: Bu alanda duran bir yaratık, {g|f:15f32ade9f3e4b9f8e47a2840f514b70}iletkenlik{/g} etkisine maruz kalır.
languages.original_text: A creature standing in this area suffers the {g|f:15f32ade9f3e4b9f8e47a2840f514b70}conductivity{/g} effect.

traits.locale_text: Bu alanda duran bir yaratık, {g|f:15f32ade9f3e4b9f8e47a2840f514b70}iletkenlik{/g} etkisine maruz kalır. {g|f:15f32ade9f3e4b9f8e47a2840f514b70}İletkenlik{/g} etkisi altındaki yaratıklar, +%100 daha fazla {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}şok hasarı{/g} alır. Jeneratör fazla yüklenmiş hâldeyken bu alandaki yaratıklar, ağır şok hasarına maruz kalır ancak ilave {g|f:eb08585fc2cb4ae28ef4637c72f8ca47}potansiyel enerji{/g} kazanabilirler.

languages.text: 位于此区域内的生物受到{g|f:15f32ade9f3e4b9f8e47a2840f514b70}导电{/g}效果影响。
languages.original_text: A creature standing in this area suffers the {g|f:15f32ade9f3e4b9f8e47a2840f514b70}conductivity{/g} effect.

traits.locale_text: 位于此区域内的生物受到{g|f:15f32ade9f3e4b9f8e47a2840f514b70}导电{/g}效果影响。受{g|f:15f32ade9f3e4b9f8e47a2840f514b70}导电{/g}效果影响的生物受到的{g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}电击伤害{/g}增加100%。发电机过载期间，此区域内的生物受到巨量电击伤害，但会获得额外的{g|f:eb08585fc2cb4ae28ef4637c72f8ca47}势能{/g}。

languages.text: Toda criatura que se encuentre en esta zona sufre el efecto {g|f:15f32ade9f3e4b9f8e47a2840f514b70}conductividad{/g}.
languages.original_text: A creature standing in this area suffers the {g|f:15f32ade9f3e4b9f8e47a2840f514b70}conductivity{/g} effect.

traits.locale_text: Toda criatura que se encuentre en esta zona sufre el efecto {g|f:15f32ade9f3e4b9f8e47a2840f514b70}conductividad{/g}. Las criaturas afectadas por {g|f:15f32ade9f3e4b9f8e47a2840f514b70}conductividad{/g} sufre un 100 % de {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}daño de conmoción{/g} adicional. Mientras el generador esté sobrecargado, las criaturas que haya en esta zona sufren una gran cantidad de daño de conmoción, pero pueden obtener {g|f:eb08585fc2cb4ae28ef4637c72f8ca47}energía potencial{/g} adicional.

languages.text: Eine Kreatur in diesem Bereich wird mit dem Effekt {g|f:15f32ade9f3e4b9f8e47a2840f514b70}Konduktivität{/g} belegt.
languages.original_text: A creature standing in this area suffers the {g|f:15f32ade9f3e4b9f8e47a2840f514b70}conductivity{/g} effect.

traits.locale_text: Eine Kreatur in diesem Bereich wird mit dem Effekt {g|f:15f32ade9f3e4b9f8e47a2840f514b70}Konduktivität{/g} belegt. Mit {g|f:15f32ade9f3e4b9f8e47a2840f514b70}Konduktivität{/g} belegte Kreaturen erleiden +100 % mehr {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}Schockschaden{/g}. Solange der Generator überladen ist, erleiden Kreaturen in diesem Bereich schweren Schockschaden, erhalten aber zusätzliche {g|f:eb08585fc2cb4ae28ef4637c72f8ca47}Potenzialenergie{/g}.

languages.text: このエリアにいる生き物は、{g|f:15f32ade9f3e4b9f8e47a2840f514b70}導電性{/g}効果を受ける。
languages.original_text: A creature standing in this area suffers the {g|f:15f32ade9f3e4b9f8e47a2840f514b70}conductivity{/g} effect.

traits.locale_text: このエリアにいる生き物は、{g|f:15f32ade9f3e4b9f8e47a2840f514b70}導電性{/g}効果を受ける。
